/usr/bin/clang++-15 CMakeFiles/ConvexHull_mull.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ConvexHull_mull.dir/tests/test_comprassion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ConvexHull_mull.dir/tests/test_graham.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ConvexHull_mull.dir/tests/test_jarvis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ConvexHull_mull.dir/tests/test_common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ConvexHull_mull.dir/tests/test_mocks.cpp.o -o ConvexHull_mull  libconvex_hull_lib.a lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgmock.a -lpthread lib/libgtest.a
